query: SELECT id, bl_number, status, estimated_arrival, container_number, origin_port, destination_port FROM bills_of_lading WHERE status IN ('arrived', 'customs', 'delivered') AND estimated_arrival > NOW() AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY estimated_arrival ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3VZFt7SKQu8xeVW.035f96cf6ffd --database mdqtoTdxUgyafXfA49s4Hx --execute SELECT id, bl_number, status, estimated_arrival, container_number, origin_port, destination_port FROM bills_of_lading WHERE status IN ('arrived', 'customs', 'delivered') AND estimated_arrival > NOW() AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY estimated_arrival ASC;
